canonical_name: the priests of their God of death and doom
the priest I had consecrated to do that last battle against the Christian priests
servant of those who serve the Gods, who are all One
those who serve the Gods, who are all One
the one person alive who knew me as I was
a garden filed with scentless flowers and eternal peace
the forest where the little folk live still
the grove where I lay with the young stag in the darkness of the eclipse
the maiden who had sent forth the young stag to challenge the running deer
that shoreless sea of which I may not speak
the dark figure at the prow
a mother she has not seen for many years
the house where once Viviane had dwelt
the inner room of the house
some who had seen the tree of the Holy Thom
Drustan, they were not after all retelling some old tale of Diarmid
the priestesses in the House of Maidens
the very holy places of Avalon
the orchards white with blossom in the moonlight
